description: Automates browser-based approval workflows for ringi (稟議), expense reports (経費), and invoice approvals (請求書). Navigates to the approval system, lists pending items, reviews content, and approves or rejects.

steps_hint: Navigate to approval system login page
Review each item's content and details
Approve or reject based on policy criteria
hints._comment: Pattern C: judgment-branching workflow. High-value items require human confirmation; low-value items can be auto-approved per policy.
